title: cyperus intricatus
intro: Cyperus intricatus, also known as the tangled flatsedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe digestive issues.
